Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.CalendarEventSimple

Represents simple data for a calendar event.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
EventId

Identifier of the event

 integer

None.
EventUrl

The URL in itslearning web to open the calendar event in the web view.

 string

None.
EventTitle

Title of the event

 string

None.
FromDate

The plan's start date

 date

None.
ToDate

The plan's end date

 date

None.
EventType

The event's location type.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Calendar.CalendarEventType

None.
LocationId

The event location identifier.

 integer

None.
LocationType

The event's location type.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LocationType

None.
